palettes.hero_text: Palettes extracted and saved from subfigures are shown here. Each color set can be traced back to its source figure.
palettes.filter_desc: Find palettes by paper title, subfigure caption, or source group to review the origin of each color set.
palettes.filter_keyword_placeholder: Paper title, subfigure caption, palette name
palettes.sort_paper_created_at: By paper creation time, then Fig order
palettes.empty_text: Extract subfigures first; palettes will be generated automatically and appear here.
palettes.caption_placeholder: No caption for this subfigure yet.
palettes.caption_hint: Caption is searchable; press Ctrl/Cmd + Enter to save quickly.
palettes.msg_no_source: Missing source paper info for this palette
palettes.msg_no_main_figure: No main figures available in this paper
palettes.confirm_delete: This only removes the palette binding; the subfigure will not be deleted.
